summary: Comprehensive frontend audit of Raw Surf OS completed. All 10 requested features tested and working correctly: Login flow, Feed page, Profile page, Messages page, Notifications page, Gallery page, Admin P1 Dashboard, Impersonation feature, Light mode theme, and Create Post modal.

login_flow.details: Login with admin account (dpritzker0905@gmail.com / Test123!) works correctly. Redirects to /feed after successful login. 'Welcome back!' toast displayed.

feed_page.details: Feed loads with posts showing @usernames (e.g., @davidpritzker). For You and Following tabs visible. Check In, streak counter, and Post button functional.

profile_page.details: Profile shows @davidpritzker, David Pritzker, Cocoa Beach location. Stats: 15 posts, 3 followers, 10 following. Pinned section visible with photos. Edit profile, Go Live, Stoke buttons present.

messages_page.details: Messages page loads with conversation tabs: Crew Chats, The Channel, Primary. Conversations list visible with user avatars and last message preview.

notifications_page.details: Notifications render correctly in light mode. Shows various notification types: Terms of Service Violation, following notifications, Session Booked, New Booking Request. Text has good contrast.

gallery_page.details: My Gallery shows 7 photos with watermarked previews. Gallery Pricing section displays prices for Gallery Photos, Videos, Live Session, On-Demand. 5 folders with Live Session galleries. Upload Photo and New Folder buttons functional.

admin_p1_dashboard.details: Admin P1 Dashboard accessible via Admin Console > Verification. Tabs: Verification Queue, Impersonation, Fraud Detection, Compliance, User Journey, Test Accounts. All tabs load correctly.

test_accounts_tab.details: Test Accounts tab shows: Seed All Roles button, Cleanup Old (>7 days) button, role badges (Surfer, Photographer, Approved Pro, Grom, GromParent, Competitive Surfer), 24 existing test accounts with View As buttons.

impersonation_feature.details: Impersonation works end-to-end: Click 'View As' on test account -> Orange gradient banner appears at top showing Admin View, target user info (Test Comp Surfer), Read-Only Mode, Admin name, End Session button. Banner persists across navigation. End Session button restores admin view.

light_mode_theme.details: Light mode accessible via Theme button in sidebar. Shows Light Mode, Dark Mode, Beach Mode options with System Preview. All pages (Feed, Profile, Messages, Notifications, Explore) render correctly in light mode with proper text contrast.

create_post_modal.details: Create Post modal opens from Create button in sidebar. Shows 'Select media to post' with Photo (JPG, PNG, HEIC) and Video (MP4, MOV) options. Take Photo and Create Ad buttons visible. Theme-aware styling in light mode.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Complete frontend audit passed. All 10 requested features working: Login, Feed, Profile, Messages, Notifications, Gallery, Admin P1 Dashboard, Test Accounts, Impersonation, Light Mode, Create Post. Backend API audit previously completed with 100% pass rate (33/33 endpoints). App is fully functional. Instagram-style @username system integrated throughout. Theme system supports Light, Dark, and Beach modes.
